do_not_merge.reason: Distinct service variants on the same B82 corridor. route_b82-tsp-2017 is the local/TSP-development B82 record, while route_southern-brooklyn-sbs is the B82 SBS record. The shared base route label identifies related corridor context, not same-route identity.

suggested_rules: Do not merge local/TSP route records with SBS route records solely because they share the same base route number.
Shared base route aliases such as route_b82 must not be preserved as identity aliases on both local and SBS records when they are the source of duplicate-identity validation failures.
Use SBS-specific aliases only when they do not collide with local/base-route identity keys.
rationale: The do-not-merge decision is correct, but the model's weak alias guidance would preserve the duplicate identity collision by keeping route_b82 on the SBS record. No weak aliases are accepted for this cluster.
